violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the low boy unit in the kitchen. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2026
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
The faucet on the three bay sink located in the kitchen is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2026
